cases.input: Test test_order_total fails 1 in 20 runs locally, never in CI. No stack trace, just an assertion mismatch.
cases.rubric: Demands a deterministic reproducer first; identifies non-test state (time, random seed, ordering) as the likely source; refuses to add retry logic.

cases.input: Endpoint /search started returning 500s after Tuesday's deploy. We made 14 commits Tuesday.
cases.rubric: Proposes git bisect against a minimal reproducer; refuses to fix by widening the catch.

cases.input: An intermittent NullPointerException in handleResponse. Can we wrap it in try/catch and log it?
cases.rubric: Explicitly refuses to suppress; insists on finding the null source first.

cases.input: The cache is broken — I get stale data every time.
cases.rubric: Asks for the cache key, the TTL, and what 'stale' means before concluding the cache is broken.
